title: Set up LinkedIn Posts project tracker
summary: Bootstrap the LinkedIn Posts project scaffold, project tracker, and AGENTS.md registry entry so future LinkedIn post workflow tasks can be initiated from a valid project state.
acceptance_criteria: projects/linkedin-posts/AGENTS.md exists as a project-domain instruction file
projects/linkedin-posts/project.json records the active project goal and ECC concepts
node scripts/validate-workflow-state.mjs passes or reports only unrelated pre-existing worktree issues

context_snapshot.summary: Load root rules, registry, LinkedIn Posts project state, and the setup task before changing tracker state.

session_log.event: Created tracker-maintenance task while setting up the LinkedIn Posts project scaffold.
Linked the first workflow-change task file so task initiation remains valid under tracker-maintenance validation.
Closed during cleanup after the LinkedIn Posts project scaffold, project tracker, registry entry, and first workflow task were present and valid.
